headline: Is SLB (SLB) the Best Turnaround Stock to Buy in 2026?
summary: SLB N.V. (NYSE:SLB) is one of the 7 Best Turnaround Stocks to Buy in 2026. On June 8, 2026, SLB N.V. (NYSE:SLB) announced that its OneSubsea joint venture was awarded a contract by bp (BP) to provide a subsea boosting system for the Thunder Horse project. Mads Hjelmeland, CEO of SLB OneSubsea, said subsea boosting […]
